title: codereview: from_ipv6 assumes IID in bytes 8-15 without validation
description: No check if address is link-local/ULA or has valid IID structure. Could add is_ula() || is_link_local() guard or make infallible assumption explicit in docs. P2 robustness for codereview. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-yufp
close_reason: Fixed from_ipv6 to use Ipv6Addr::iid() + explicit docs+test for IID assumption; updated iid() doc; verified with cargo test+clippy. 3 codereview passes completed via test/correctness, doc/robustness, clippy/security. No other real issues found.
